meaning: n.<美>天桥,陆桥vt.胜过,通过,忽视
examples: They'd taken refuge under an overpass to ride out the flames.
They deflated the tires slightly to allow the truck to drive under the overpass.
The mud volcano was absent in a previous overpass on February 11, 2010, shown in the lower image.
The two cars were the only ones on the overpass at the time, authorities said.
Across town, Wilbur Smith(ph) is getting ready to settle in to another night spent under an overpass.
